auth_notes: Authentication typically requires an API Key and a Secret Key passed in the HTTP headers (e.g., x-api-key). Some legacy endpoints may use Basic Auth with Merchant credentials.
rate_limits: Not publicly disclosed; typically requires contact with developer support for specific tier limits.
gotchas: Documentation is not fully public and often requires a partner account or direct request to their technical team.
Strict HIPAA compliance must be maintained when processing Patient Health Information (PHI) through n8n.
The API is primarily focused on the Practice Management Bridge, so functionality may vary based on the specific version of the bridge installed.
research_notes: Integration will require the HTTP Request node. Users must manually define headers for 'x-api-key' and 'Content-Type'. Webhooks are supported for payment notifications but must be configured via the Rectangle Health administrative portal to point to the n8n production webhook URL.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration will require the HTTP Request node. Users must manually define headers for 'x-api-key' and 'Content-Type'. Webhooks are supported for payment notifications but must be configured via the Rectangle Health administrative portal to point to the n8n production webhook URL.
